MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-15-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DALTON HO, RACHEL LI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION: 1) DECLARATORY RELIEF - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT ANY DERIVATIVE CAUSES OF ACTION; 2) QUIET TITLE - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS THAT THEY SEEK INTEREST IN THE REAL PROPERTY, ONLY THAT THEY SEEK MONETARY JUDGMENT; 3) FRAUDULENT TRANSFERS - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS OF ANY TRANSFERS; 4) NEGLIGENCE - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS TO ESTABLISH ANY DUTY OF CARE OWED BY DEFENDANTS; 5) CONSPIRACY TO DEFRAUD - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE ANY FACTS FOR ANOTHER TORT(S). DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED AS TO THE EXISTENCE OF THE FILINGS, NOT THE CONTENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY, FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION: 1) DECLARATORY RELIEF - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT ANY DERIVATIVE CAUSES OF ACTION; 2) QUIET TITLE - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS THAT THEY SEEK INTEREST IN THE REAL PROPERTY, ONLY THAT THEY SEEK MONETARY JUDGMENT; 3) FRAUDULENT TRANSFERS - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS OF ANY TRANSFERS; 4) NEGLIGENCE - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE FACTS TO ESTABLISH ANY DUTY OF CARE OWED BY DEFENDANTS; 5) CONSPIRACY TO DEFRAUD - PLAINTIFFS DO NOT ALLEGE ANY FACTS FOR ANOTHER TORT(S). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-14-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DALTON HO, RACHEL LI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to allege facts sufficient to support the following causes of action: 1) Declaratory relief - Plaintiffs do not allege facts to support any derivative causes of action; 2) Quiet Title - Plaintiffs do not allege facts that they seek interest in the real property, only that they seek monetary judgment; 3) Fraudulent transfers - Plaintiffs do not allege facts of any transfers; 4) Negligence - Plaintiffs do not allege facts to establish any duty of care owed by Defendants; 5) Conspiracy to defraud - Plaintiffs do not allege any facts for another tort(s). Defendants' Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED as to the existence of the filings, not the content.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
